description_long: This object consists of several large, irregularly shaped white garbage bags piled together, with some areas showing dirt stains and weathering. The bags are made of thin, flexible plastic and are filled to the point of bulging, giving them a lumpy, uneven appearance. One bag features a prominent blue stripe, adding a distinct visual element to the otherwise monochromatic grouping. The surface of the bags is wrinkled and creased, with some areas appearing more compressed than others, suggesting a mix of soft and semi-firm contents inside. No printed labels or logos are visible, and the bags are tightly closed, likely with knots or simple ties. The pile is situated directly on the ground, typical of street trash awaiting collection.
description: A pile of large, white, bulging garbage bags with dirt stains and a blue stripe, tightly closed and resting on the ground.
description_view_0: This view shows the pile from the front-left, highlighting the wrinkled white bags with a visible patch of dirt and a hint of blue from one bag.
description_view_1: From the rear, the bags appear more compressed and the surface creases are prominent, with no blue stripe visible.
description_view_2: The right side reveals the lumpy, bulging shape of the bags, with dirt stains and a more pronounced overhanging top bag.
description_view_3: The front-right view features the blue stripe most clearly, with the bags appearing tightly packed and slightly cleaner on this side.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: bulging and overfilled, with taut surfaces and irregular lumps
